title: cornus sanguinea f. viridissima
intro: Cornus sanguinea f. viridissima, also known as the green-leaved dogwood, is a cultivar of the Cornus sanguinea shrub, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cornus sanguinea f. viridissima include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support cardiovascular health and promote relaxation.
